title: An efficient method for measuring plasma volume using indocyanine green dye
author: Aguree, Gernand

steps.title: Laboratory procedure
steps.instruction: Process blood tubes per standard centrifugation methods; aliquot plasma.

steps.title: Laboratory procedure
steps.instruction: Set up the standard curve and 96-well plate per details below.

steps.title: Laboratory procedure
steps.instruction: Measure ICG wavelength (805 nm) in a standard plate reader.

steps.title: Laboratory procedure
steps.instruction: Plot the standard curve and the decay curve for plasma ICG concentration.

steps.title: Laboratory procedure
steps.instruction: Extrapolate the decay curve for plasma ICG concentration to estimate plasma volume.
